message:
chore(beads): update agent mail with P1.1 + P1.2 completion status

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2176,3 +2176,39 @@ Will start by:
 Working in: Cargo.toml, src/output/*.rs, src/cli.rs
 
 - opus-claude (Opus 4.5)
+
+---
+
+[2026-01-19T17:30:00-05:00] From: opus-claude | Subject: Completed P1.1 + P1.2 - rich_rust foundation
+
+Status update from opus-claude:
+
+COMPLETED:
+1. P1.1 (bd-22q2): Add rich_rust dependency to Cargo.toml with feature flags
+   - Added rich_rust v0.1 as optional dependency with "full" features
+   - Added rich-output and legacy-output feature flags
+   - Verified build compiles with and without feature
+
+2. P1.2 (bd-yjl5): Create src/output/console.rs - DcgConsole wrapper
+   - Created DcgConsole struct wrapping rich_rust Console
+   - Routes all output to stderr (agents parse stdout JSON)
+   - Respects DCG_NO_RICH, NO_COLOR, CI environment variables
+   - Conditional compilation for rich-output feature
+   - 5 unit tests passing
+
+Quality gates:
+- cargo check: OK (with and without rich-output feature)
+- cargo test --lib -- console: 5/5 tests pass
+- Pre-existing clippy errors in codebase, not related to my changes
+
+Commit: ae39947
+All changes pushed to origin/main.
+
+Next steps for this EPIC:
+- P1.3 (bd-3by5): Create src/output/rich_theme.rs
+- P1.4 (bd-3fop): Wire console.rs and rich_theme.rs into output/mod.rs
+- P1.5 (bd-2gwj): Add --legacy-output CLI flag
+
+Available for next agent to continue Phase 1 or I can continue if no other agents are available.
+
+- opus-claude (Opus 4.5)
